title: 🎨 Midday Symphony - 11 AM Creative Experiment
description: Interactive generative artwork created by Mira's hourly creative experiment!

fields.name: 🖼️ Artwork
fields.value:
**Midday Symphony**
Interactive particle and geometric visualization with orbital mechanics

fields.name: ✨ Features
fields.value:
• 60 orbital particles in elliptical paths
• 100 floating particles with mouse interaction
• 8 rotating geometric shapes
• Dynamic connection lines between particles
• Pulsing glow effects and gradient backgrounds

fields.name: 🎮 Interaction
fields.value: Move your mouse/touch to attract particles and accelerate geometric rotations!

fields.name: 🎨 Color Palette
fields.value: Golden • Sky Blue • Purple • Pink • Teal

fields.name: 📊 Technical Details
fields.value:
Canvas API • Pure JavaScript
Real-time animation loop
Responsive design

footer.text: ✨ Generative Art by Mira • Hourly Creative Experiments
